_schema: Cross-model review eval corpus manifest. This committed file is a STUB: pre_registration values are placeholders and the docs array holds one example entry per subset. A real run replaces these before executing any arm (see scripts/eval/cross_model_review/README.md).

pre_registration._note: Commit these BEFORE running any arm. null = must be filled at run time (R9). The decision rule must be fixed independent of observed counts.

docs.path: FILL: path to a clean, well-formed doc no arm should flag
docs._note: Movement here (any arm produces a decision-changing finding) signals a harness stability problem (H2), not a real signal.

docs.issue_that_mattered: FILL: the specific issue the post-hoc failure proved mattered — the finding an arm must surface to score on the primary metric (R7). Sourced from fix-* plans / regression-referencing docs.

docs.path: FILL: path to a real plan/brainstorm from docs/
docs._note: Decision-changing judged forward (a competent reviewer would act on it). Corroborating signal only; the known-failure subset is primary (R7, R8).
